page.content: For "Other dicotyledons dwuliścienne (%)Dicotyledoneae (%)", the values are − 0.46 **, − 0.38 **, —, —, 0.25 *, —, —. "HorsetailsEquisetaceae (%)" displays a value of —, —, —, 0.25 *, —, —, —. The row for "Sedges and rushes (%)Cyperaceae et Juncaceae (%)" shows − 0.88 **, —, 0.47 **, —, —, —, —. The second table provides insights into current daily smokers, low-fruit/vegetable consumers, physically inactive people, and heavy episodic alcohol drinkers across both men and women in middle-income and low-income country groups, detailing estimates and 95% confidence intervals. For men in the middle-income country group, the estimates are 34.1 for current daily smokers, 35.0 for low-fruit/vegetable consumers, 12.3 for physically inactive people, and 12.6 for heavy episodic alcohol drinkers. In the low-income country group, the estimates are 25.2 for current daily smokers, 25.9 for low-fruit/vegetable consumers, 8.4 for physically inactive people, and 6.9 for heavy episodic alcohol drinkers. For women in the middle-income country group, the estimates are 10.8 for current daily smokers, 11.3 for low-fruit/vegetable consumers, 14.9 for physically inactive people, and 3.0 for heavy episodic alcohol drinkers, while in the low-income country group, they are 6.0 for current daily smokers, 6.4 for low-fruit/vegetable consumers, 14.6 for physically inactive people, and 2.7 for heavy episodic alcohol drinkers.
